ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (active, inactive, banned) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the player logged in */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the player registered */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Device ID used by the player for login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "max_level" INTEGER /* Maximum level in the game mode */,
  "scoring_rules" TEXT /* Detailed scoring rules for the game mode */,
  "time_limit" TEXT /* Time limit for the game mode (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode the level belongs to */,
  "level_number" INTEGER /* Number of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the level */,
  "time_limit" INTEGER /* Time limit for the level (in seconds) */,
  "required_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines required to complete the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the score */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the score was achieved in */,
  "base_score" INTEGER /* Base score earned by the player */,
  "cascade_bonus" INTEGER /* Cascade bonus earned by the player */,
  "cumulative_score" INTEGER /* Cumulative score earned by the player */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date and time when the score was achieved */,
  "level_completion_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the level (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode the leaderboard is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the leaderboard */,
  "cumulative_score" INTEGER /* Cumulative score of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player on the leaderboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the leaderboard was updated */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the score was achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "level_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the progress */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the progress was made in */,
  "lines_cleared" INTEGER /* Number of lines cleared by the player */,
  "cascade_level" INTEGER /* Cascade level reached by the player */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the progress was made */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent on the level (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_progress_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_progress_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_level_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the session */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the session (in seconds) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Final score achieved in the session */,
  "lines_cleared" INTEGER /* Total number of lines cleared in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
